bench_setup.notes: EXTI trigger test. PB8 (output) drives 10 rising edges. PB9 (input, pull-down) routed via SYSCFG to EXTI9, rising-edge interrupt. PASS after all 10 EXTI9_5 interrupts received. detail0 = interrupt count. FAIL with error_code=0x01 and detail0=count if timeout before all 10 edges received. Exercises: SYSCFG EXTI routing, NVIC EXTI9_5, interrupt delivery.

peripheral_signals.notes: Drives 10 rising edges (1 ms low + 1 ms high each). Wire: PB8 → PB9.
EXTI9 input with pull-down, SYSCFG routed to Port B. Wire: PB8 → PB9.
